notes: Best overall provider: `gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` scored 96.15/100 using balanced overall weighting.
Worst overall provider: `gemini/gemini-3.1-pro-preview` scored 56.69/100 using balanced overall weighting.
The cheapest cloud provider was `glm/glm-ocr` at 0.0345¢ ($0.0003).

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Best balanced options across accuracy, processing speed, and cost efficiency.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Middle options that miss Tier 1 but may have a specific accuracy, speed, or cost advantage.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Lowest balanced options, generally weaker across the combined benchmark categories.
